records.title: Socceroos sweat on scans for injured star Jordan Bos
records.description: The Socceroos will hope Jordan Bos has avoided a serious left knee injury as the dynamic wing-back heads in for scans.

records.title: Morocco send Canada crashing out of World Cup
records.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice in the second half as Morocco beat co-hosts Canada 3-0 in Houston to book their place in the World Cup quarterfinals.

records.title: France's Aurélien Tchouaméni out vs. Paraguay with groin injury
records.description: Aurélien Tchouaméni, who left Friday's training with adductor pain, sits out France's World Cup round-of-16 match Saturday vs. Paraguay in Philadelphia, and he could also miss a potential quarterfinal on July 9 should France advance.
